## Problem

What Spring dependency question or workflow is currently difficult?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the command, extraction fact, or integration you would like.

## Alternatives

What workarounds have you considered?

## Compatibility

Note any expected schema, JSON contract, performance, or platform impact.
